a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Healthcare coverage by level of healthcare spending, 2021
Universal healthcare coverage (UHC) service coverage is measured on a scale from 0 (worst) to 100 (best)
based on the average coverage of essential healthcare services.
Data source: Multiple sources compiled by World Bank (2024)
